form.name: Name *
form.missingFieldsDesc: Please fill in all required fields.
form.success: Your inquiry has been sent successfully.
form.successDesc: We will get back to you shortly.
form.errorDesc: Unfortunately, your inquiry could not be sent. Please try again or contact us at kontakt@healio.de

contactForm.title: Get a Non-Binding Consultation
contactForm.subtitle: Are you publicly insured and want to get more out of your healthcare? Write to us — we'll find the right coverage for you.
contactForm.requiredFields: * Required fields. Your data will be transmitted securely and treated confidentially.
contactForm.missingFieldsDesc: Please fill in all required fields.

termin.title: Book an Appointment
termin.subtitle: Secure your preferred slot for a free and non-binding initial consultation.
termin.confirmation: You will automatically receive a confirmation by email after booking.

potenzialanalyse.title: Your Potential Analysis.
potenzialanalyse.subtitle: Let us check in 15 minutes how much untapped payroll budget your company currently has.
potenzialanalyse.name: Your Name *
potenzialanalyse.successDesc: Thank you! Your inquiry has been saved successfully. We will contact you shortly.
potenzialanalyse.errorSendDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
potenzialanalyse.validationDesc: Please fill in all marked required fields.
potenzialanalyse.employeesRequired: Please select the number of employees
potenzialanalyse.bavRequired: Please indicate whether focus is on bAV
potenzialanalyse.bkvRequired: Please indicate whether focus is on bKV

confirmation.title: Appointment Request Successfully Sent!
confirmation.subtitle: Review process initiated.
confirmation.text1: Thank you for your inquiry. We have received your data and forwarded a confirmation to our team (info@healio.de). We will get back to you shortly to finalize the appointment.
confirmation.text2: Thank you for your information. We are currently reviewing your details to calculate the exact savings potential for your company.
confirmation.bookSlotDesc: Secure a suitable time for our meeting directly in our calendar.
confirmation.appointmentDesc: One of our experts will review your appointment request and get in touch with you shortly.
confirmation.alternativeCalendar: Alternatively, you can also book the appointment directly in a new tab if the calendar above doesn't load correctly.
confirmation.calendarRedirect: You will be redirected to Google Calendar to securely book your appointment.
